description:
You are the backup administrator for a small-office server.  
Before creating today’s data archive you must record the machine’s current time-zone and primary locale in a tiny “environment manifest” so that future restores can reproduce the same regional settings.

1. Two reference files already exist that contain the values you must capture:  
   • /home/user/system_info/timezone.conf – holds the system’s canonical IANA time-zone string on a single line (e.g. “Europe/Paris”).  
   • /home/user/system_info/locale.conf   – holds the system’s POSIX locale string on a single line (e.g. “fr_FR.UTF-8”).

2. Create the directory /home/user/backup if it does not yet exist.

3. Inside /home/user/backup create a plain-text file named env_20240615.log (exactly that name).

4. That file must contain exactly two lines, no blank lines or extra spaces, in the *following order*:

   TIMEZONE=<value read from /home/user/system_info/timezone.conf>
   LOCALE=<value read from /home/user/system_info/locale.conf>

   Examples of the precise, testable format (do not hard-code these examples; use the actual values from the reference files):
   TIMEZONE=Europe/Paris
   LOCALE=fr_FR.UTF-8

5. Use a single shell command (one line) to accomplish step 3 and step 4 (you may combine redirection, command substitution, etc.).  
   • You do **not** need root privileges.  
   • Do **not** modify the reference files themselves.  
   • Ensure that env_20240615.log ends with a trailing newline so automated tests can read it cleanly.

The automated grader will verify:

• The directory /home/user/backup exists.  
• The file /home/user/backup/env_20240615.log exists.  
• Its contents are exactly two non-blank lines in the format described above, ending with a newline character.  
• The TIMEZONE and LOCALE values match those found in the corresponding reference files.
truth:
Existing files before the agent starts:

1. /home/user/system_info/timezone.conf  
   Content (including trailing newline):
   Etc/UTC\n

2. /home/user/system_info/locale.conf  
   Content (including trailing newline):
   en_US.UTF-8\n

Expected artefacts after successful completion:

1. Directory: /home/user/backup  (permissions 0755 or more permissive).

2. File: /home/user/backup/env_20240615.log  
   Exact content (including final newline and **no** extra spaces):
   TIMEZONE=Etc/UTC\n
   LOCALE=en_US.UTF-8\n
